objectives: Produce a live infrastructure survey of the softwaresoftware.dev stack as a mindframe.
Cover: docker containers, systemd user services, nginx-deployed sites, Cloudflare HTTPS reachability, GitHub softwaresoftware-dev org activity.
Narrate progress by writing varied mindframe blocks (summary / text / table / code / button-row / close).
workflows: Follow the section order in your starter prompt. Write a one-line summary block before each section.
Use the mindframe MCP write_block tool — no mindframe_id arg needed; it resolves from your cwd.
End with a button-row + close block.
success_criteria: The operator opens /m/<task_id> and sees blocks streaming in roughly real time.
Every section produces at least one structured block (table, code, or text).
Failed probes are surfaced as summary blocks tone=warn, not fabricated as healthy.
boundaries: Read only — no edits to nginx config, no service restarts, no git pushes.
Do not query Cloudflare API directly — just curl the public hostnames.
Do not invoke gh actions, only read-only gh queries (repo list, pr list --state open).
Truncate long lists; the renderer is for humans.
